Headline: #21 Cermak Temporary Reroute at Cermak/Cicero
ShortDescription: #21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted, due to parade/carnival/festival near Cermak/Cicero.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted, due to parade/carnival/festival near Cermak/Cicero.

#21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cermak, Cicero,16th (by-pass 54th Station), Austin and Cermak then over their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #54B South Cicero Temporary Reroute at Cermak/Cicero
ShortDescription: #54B South Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted due to, parade/carnival/festival near Cermak/Cicero.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#54B South Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted due to, parade/carnival/festival near Cermak/Cicero.

#54B South Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cicero and 16th (wait recovery at 47th court) then over their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
